steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage states that leaders are presented as “the major actors” and workers as “nearly devoid of agency.” The blank word must capture the dynamic of downplaying or sidelining a group.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
Marginalize fits perfectly—it means to treat as unimportant or peripheral.
The other three either express the opposite (epitomize and extol celebrate), or are unrelated (substantiate means to confirm).
This matches choice B — B is correct.
